name: Settled comp after ladder fall, later worse pain—reopen?
description: Reopen if worsens within time limit—don't finalize yet.

mainEntity.name: Settled comp after ladder fall, later worse pain—reopen?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reopen if worsens within time limit—don't finalize yet.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, within 5-8 years** if surgery/new worsening in Utah/Idaho.[1][6]

Medical justification required.

- New doctor opinion.
- Avoid final settlements early.

Lawyers reserve reopen rights.
